basicAttack.name: Order: Flare Propulsion
basicAttack.description: Deals Fire DMG equal to 50%~130% of Firefly's ATK to a single enemy.

skill.name: Order: Aerial Bombardment
skill.description: Consumes 40% of Firefly's current HP. Deals Fire DMG equal to 100%~250% of Firefly's ATK to a single enemy and adjacent enemies. If current HP is insufficient, HP drops to 1 instead.

ultimate.name: Fyrefly Type-IV: Complete Combustion
ultimate.description: Enters Complete Combustion state for 3 turns. In this state, Firefly's SPD increases by 50, her Skill becomes Enhanced Skill, and her Basic ATK becomes Enhanced Basic ATK. When entering Complete Combustion, immediately takes action.

talent.name: Chrysalid Pyron
talent.description: When Firefly's current HP percentage is 50% or lower, her Break Effect increases by 50%~125%. After using Enhanced Skill, if the enemy is Weakness Broken, deals additional Fire DMG equal to a percentage of Firefly's Break Effect.

technique.name: Order: Meteoric Incineration
technique.description: After using Technique, Firefly enters battle with 50% of her Max HP consumed and immediately enters Complete Combustion state for 3 turns.
